exp_title: Midgut polyA RNA of Apis mellifera Forager (Colony 3)
design: Libraries were made with the NEBNext Illumina RNA-Seq library kit according to the manufacturer’s instructions. Sequencing was performed on the HiSeq 2000 (100 bp paired end).
sample_title: Midgut polyA RNA of Apis mellifera (Forager)
sample_description: Midgut of the Forager caste of Apis mellifera. Tissues were stored at -80C. RNA was extracted using Trizol protocl. Tissues homogenized in Trizol within 5 minutes of dissection.
center: UC Davis Department of Entomology and Nematology
biomaterial_provider: Harry H. Laidlaw Jr. Honey Bee Research Facility 1 Bee Biology Rd, Davis, CA 95616

study_title: Transcriptomic profiling of Apis mellifera flight muscle after pyrroloquinoline-quinone (PQQ) supplementation
exp_title: RNA-seq of apis mellifera: adult forager bee throrax
design: RNA-Seq was performed on flight muscle samples from Apis mellifera honey bees collected from National Chung Hsing University bee farm. Total RNA was extracted using a column-based method with on-membrane DNase I treatment. 1 g of total RNA was used for library preparation. Poly(A) mRNA was isolated using Oligo(dT) beads and then fragmented. cDNA synthesis was performed using random primers for first-strand synthesis, followed by second-strand synthesis. Double-stranded cDNA underwent end-repair, A-tailing, and adaptor ligation. Libraries were size-selected using DNA Clean Beads and PCR-amplified with P5 and P7 primers. Libraries were multiplexed and sequenced on an Illumina NovaSeq instrument using a 2x150 paired-end (PE) configuration.

exp_title: RNA-seq of Apis mellifera: mushroom body of adult foragers
design: This study examines transcriptomic differences in honey bee mushroom bodies based on DWV infection status and learning ability.
